scenarios.name: Manager-role login and Ingestion tab navigation
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:8080
Log in with manager credentials via POST /auth/login
Verify nav bar renders with Ingestion tab button (data-testid='ingestion-tab-button')
Click Ingestion tab button
Verify data-testid='ingestion-page' container is present
Assert no console errors
scenarios.given: A manager-role user is authenticated and navigates to the app
scenarios.when: The user clicks the Ingestion tab button in the manager nav bar
scenarios.then: IngestionPage renders (data-testid='ingestion-page') without errors; tab is absent for developer-role sessions
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: release_report_ingestion.json verdict='failed' (Docker execution blocked by system sandbox constraints; no URL deployed). Browser MCP permissions not granted in this environment. Static source-code confirmation: App.tsx line 279 declares data-testid='ingestion-tab-button' on the Ingestion nav button; line 311 conditionally renders '<IngestionPage />' only inside the manager-role branch; IngestionPage.tsx line 608 declares data-testid='ingestion-page' on the page container. Developer-role branch (lines 198-241 of App.tsx) has no Ingestion tab — manager-only access is correctly enforced.

scenarios.name: ConnectorPicker populated with >=5 connectors; credential-gated shown as disabled with tooltip
steps: Navigate to Ingestion page as manager
Wait for data-testid='connector-picker-loading' to disappear
Assert data-testid='connector-picker' is visible
Count connector option buttons (data-testid='connector-option-{source}')
Verify >=5 connectors present: gitlab, hr, slack, cv, jira
Hover over the jira button (credential-gated)
Assert button is disabled (aria-disabled or disabled attribute)
Assert tooltip/title text contains 'credentials required' or lists required credentials
scenarios.given: Manager is on the Ingestion page; GET /api/v1/ingestion/connectors returns >=5 connector descriptors
scenarios.when: ConnectorPicker mounts and fetches from GET /api/v1/ingestion/connectors
scenarios.then: >=5 connector buttons rendered; jira is disabled with tooltip listing required credentials; hr/slack/cv/gitlab are enabled
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: No live URL available. Static source-code confirmation: ConnectorPicker.tsx renders a button per connector from listIngestionConnectors() result (line 121); each button has data-testid='connector-option-{connector.source}' (line 140); isGated connectors get disabled={true} (line 141) and title='Required credentials: ...' (lines 127-130). Test plan TS-INGESTION-API TC-API-001 through TC-API-004 confirm GET /ingestion/connectors returns >=5 descriptors including jira with availability='credential-gated'. Backend test TC-API-003 verified all five sources (gitlab, hr, slack, cv, jira) present in response.

scenarios.name: File dropzone visible; accepts CSV/JSON/TXT/MD; file selection triggers multipart POST /ingestion/file
steps: Select a file-kind connector (e.g. HR CSV connector)
Assert data-testid='file-dropzone' renders
Assert data-testid='file-input' has accept attribute containing .csv, .json, .txt, .md
Programmatically select a test.csv file via the hidden file input
Assert dropzone UI updates to show filename
Click Preview button
Assert network request is POST /api/v1/ingestion/file with multipart/form-data and mode=preview
scenarios.given: Manager selects a file-kind connector (hr, slack, or cv)
scenarios.when: The FileDropzone renders and a file is selected
scenarios.then: Dropzone renders with correct accept attribute (.csv,.json,.txt,.md); selecting a file stores it; Preview triggers multipart POST
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: No live URL available. Static source-code confirmation: FileDropzone in IngestionPage.tsx has data-testid='file-dropzone' (line 173) and data-testid='file-input' (line 188); accept attribute derived from connector.accepted_file_types or defaults to '.csv,.json,.txt,.md' (lines 128-130, 186). uploadFile() in client.ts uses FormData with file, source, mode fields (lines 508-524), not setting Content-Type so browser supplies multipart boundary — correct multipart implementation confirmed.

scenarios.name: GitLab form fields with correct data-testid attributes; Jira form fields with correct data-testid attributes
steps: Select gitlab connector
Assert GitLab form renders with data-testid='gitlab-username' (required), 'gitlab-project' (optional), 'gitlab-token' (optional password)
Select jira connector (if connector picker allows — credential-gated but form code exists)
Assert Jira form renders with data-testid='jira-base-url', 'jira-email', 'jira-token', 'jira-project-key', 'jira-usernames'
scenarios.given: Manager selects the gitlab or jira connector in ConnectorPicker
scenarios.when: The connector-specific input form renders based on selectedConnector.source
scenarios.then: GitLab form shows username/project/token fields; Jira form shows base_url/email/token/project_key/usernames fields with all declared data-testid attributes
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: No live URL available. Static source-code confirmation: GitlabForm in IngestionPage.tsx lines 222-277 has data-testid='gitlab-username' (line 235), 'gitlab-project' (line 249), 'gitlab-token' (line 265). JiraForm in IngestionPage.tsx lines 285-374 has data-testid='jira-base-url' (line 300), 'jira-email' (line 315), 'jira-token' (line 330), 'jira-project-key' (line 347), 'jira-usernames' (line 363). Field types and required/optional attributes match the T-12-INGESTION-FRONTEND code spec exactly. Note: Jira connector is credential-gated (disabled in picker), but the JiraForm code path is available and correctly implemented.

scenarios.name: Preview button triggers mode=preview request; DraftReviewTable renders returned drafts
steps: Select hr connector, choose a test CSV file
Assert data-testid='preview-button' is enabled
Click Preview button
Assert loading state shown (previewing spinner)
Wait for response
Assert data-testid='ingestion-summary-banner' visible with '🔍 Preview completed'
Assert data-testid='draft-review-table-wrapper' and 'draft-review-table' visible
Assert at least one data-testid='draft-row-0' table row present
scenarios.given: Manager has a file-kind connector selected and a valid CSV file attached
scenarios.then: POST /api/v1/ingestion/file called with mode=preview; DraftReviewTable renders >=1 draft row in a scrollable table
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: No live URL available. Static source-code confirmation: handlePreview() calls executeRequest('preview') → uploadFile(file, source, 'preview') (IngestionPage.tsx lines 567-582); previewResult.drafts mapped to DraftReviewTable which renders data-testid='draft-review-table' (DraftReviewTable.tsx line 80), data-testid='draft-review-table-wrapper' (line 79), data-testid='draft-row-{idx}' per draft (line 102). SummaryBanner with data-testid='ingestion-summary-banner' shows preview statistics. Backend TC-API-008 confirms preview response includes >=1 draft entry.

scenarios.name: Approve and Create button triggers mode=commit request; UI displays updated created count
steps: After successful Preview, assert data-testid='approve-create-button' visible
Click Approve and Create button
Assert loading state shown
Wait for response
Assert data-testid='ingestion-summary-banner' changes to commit mode (green '✅ Ingestion committed')
Assert data-testid='ingestion-created-count' shows Created count > 0
scenarios.given: Manager has previewed draft profiles and sees the DraftReviewTable
scenarios.when: Approve and Create button is clicked
scenarios.then: POST /api/v1/ingestion/file called with mode=commit; IngestionSummary.created shown in data-testid='ingestion-created-count'
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: No live URL available. Static source-code confirmation: handleCommit() calls executeRequest('commit') → uploadFile(file, source, 'commit') (IngestionPage.tsx lines 585-599); commitResult rendered via SummaryBanner with mode='commit'; SummaryBanner renders data-testid='ingestion-created-count' containing 'Created: {summary.created}' (IngestionPage.tsx lines 407-411). Button data-testid='approve-create-button' declared at line 706, only shown when previewResult !== null. Backend TC-API-011 confirms commit mode returns created>=1.

scenarios.name: All data-testid attributes on interactive elements are present and correct per T-12-INGESTION-FRONTEND
steps: Cross-reference T-12-INGESTION-FRONTEND.json declaration list against source files
Check frontend/src/App.tsx for ingestion-tab-button

Check frontend/src/pages/IngestionPage.tsx for ingestion-page, file-dropzone, file-input, gitlab-username, gitlab-project, gitlab-token, jira-base-url, jira-email, jira-token, jira-project-key, jira-usernames, preview-button, approve-create-button, ingestion-created-count, ingestion-summary-banner, ingestion-error
Check frontend/src/components/ConnectorPicker.tsx for connector-picker, connector-picker-loading, connector-picker-error, connector-option-{source}
Check frontend/src/components/DraftReviewTable.tsx for draft-review-table, draft-review-table-wrapper, draft-review-empty, draft-row-{idx}
scenarios.given: Source code files are accessible for static inspection
scenarios.when: All declared data-testid attributes in T-12-INGESTION-FRONTEND.json are cross-referenced against source files
scenarios.then: Every declared data-testid attribute is present in source: all 19 testid values verified across 4 files

scenarios.name: No console errors or unhandled promise rejections during any Ingestion page interaction
steps: Open browser developer console with error monitoring
Navigate to Ingestion page as manager
Perform connector selection, file upload, preview, approve-and-create interactions
Assert no 'Uncaught' or 'UnhandledPromiseRejection' entries in console
Assert no React error boundaries triggered
scenarios.given: Manager performs a complete Ingestion workflow in a live browser session
scenarios.when: All connector picker, form, preview, and commit interactions are performed
scenarios.then: Browser console shows zero errors or unhandled promise rejections throughout
scenarios.error: BLOCKED: No live URL available; browser runtime not accessible. Static source-code confirmation: all async operations in IngestionPage.tsx are wrapped in try/catch with error state surfaced via data-testid='ingestion-error' banner (lines 656-670); ConnectorPicker.tsx catches fetch errors and sets error state shown via data-testid='connector-picker-error' (lines 82-87, 106-113); uploadFile() in client.ts catches non-ok responses and throws ApiClientError (lines 526-534); no fire-and-forget async calls — all awaited or caught.

summary.coverage_note: All 8 scenarios map to AC26 (frontend Ingestion page). DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED: release_report_ingestion.json verdict='failed' because Docker execution was blocked by system sandbox constraints — no live URL was deployed. Browser MCP permissions were not granted in this environment. S07 passed via static source-code inspection: all 19 declared data-testid attributes verified present across frontend/src/App.tsx (ingestion-tab-button), frontend/src/pages/IngestionPage.tsx (ingestion-page, file-dropzone, file-input, gitlab-username, gitlab-project, gitlab-token, jira-base-url, jira-email, jira-token, jira-project-key, jira-usernames, preview-button, approve-create-button, ingestion-created-count, ingestion-summary-banner, ingestion-error), frontend/src/components/ConnectorPicker.tsx (connector-picker, connector-picker-loading, connector-picker-error, connector-option-{source}), frontend/src/components/DraftReviewTable.tsx (draft-review-table, draft-review-table-wrapper, draft-review-empty, draft-row-{idx}). S01–S06 and S08 require a live browser session and are skipped. Gate: 106/106 backend+integration tests passed (test_plan_ingestion.json); code review approved (review_report_ingestion.json verdict='approved_with_comments'). Full browser validation should be re-run after successful deployment in a Docker-capable CI environment.
